nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: São Tomé weaver
nodes.summary: São Tomé weaver（Ploceus sanctithomae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如São Tomé weaver。

nodes.name: 圣多美岛
nodes.summary: 圣多美岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括São Tomé prinia、São Tomé white-eye、Giant sunbird等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: São Tomé weaver
nodes.summary: The São Tomé weaver (Ploceus sanctithomae) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to São Tomé and Príncipe. They are found in the island of São Tomé. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References External links Sao Tome Weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
nodes.shortSummary: The São Tomé weaver (Ploceus sanctithomae) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to São Tomé and Príncipe.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are found in the island of São Tomé
